Package com.example.musibox

package com.example.musibox
  • Class
    Description
    Album
     
    ChatActivity
    The ChatActivity class provides a chat interface where users can send and receive real-time messages with their friends using WebSocket and retrieve old chat messages from a REST API.
    ChatAdapter
     
    ChatAdapter.FriendMessageViewHolder
     
    ChatAdapter.UserMessageViewHolder
     
    ChatMessage
     
    ChatMessageManager
     
    CreateGroupActivity
    This activity allows the user to create a new group by selecting users from a list.
    ExampleInstrumentedTest
    Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
    ExampleUnitTest
    Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).

    Group
     
    GroupAdapter
     
    GroupAdapter.GroupViewHolder
     
    GroupAdapter.OnGroupClickListener
     
    GroupPlaylist
     
    homeActivity
     
    LoginActivity
    LoginActivity handles user authentication, including login and account deletion, and navigation to other activities like Sign Up and Forgot Password.
    MainActivity
     
    MainPage
    The MainPage class represents the main activity in the MusiBox application.
    Message
     
    MessageActivity
    MessageActivity handles the messaging feature of the app, allowing users to interact with their friends, send friend requests, and view or delete friends.

    SignUp
    The SignUp activity allows the user to create a new account by entering an email, password, and confirming the password.

    Interface defining methods for handling WebSocket events.
    WebSocketManager
